_instructions: This file is the brain of the intelligence layer. The synthesis engine injects it into every reasoning prompt so news gets connected to Mixta's actual position. Replace every FILL_IN with real figures. The more accurate this is, the sharper the briefing. Safe to edit by hand; it is plain JSON.

company.name: Mixta Africa
company.description: Nigerian real estate developer building affordable-to-premium residential communities, primarily along the Lagos / Ibeju-Lekki corridor.

Shift new-sales mix toward higher-margin / faster-converting segments
Pursue institutional / bulk transactions and corporate mortgage programmes
Maintain DFI credibility (EBRD, IFC) for ongoing capital raises

_competitor_note: Populate from your affordable-housing CMA deck (the 13 corridor competitors with TCO normalization). Even just names helps the engine flag competitor moves.

watch_list.why: Escalating fees are stalling Lakowe Annexe provisional approval and delaying launch timing.
Payment delays risk schedule slippage on Annexe.

watch_list.topic: Infrastructure on the Ibeju-Lekki corridor (roads, rail, Lekki deep sea port, Dangote refinery effects)
watch_list.why: Corridor infrastructure directly drives land values and demand around both Lakowe projects.

watch_list.topic: Mortgage availability / NMRC / corporate mortgage schemes
watch_list.why: Near-zero mortgage uptake is a structural drag on sales conversion; any easing is a demand unlock.

watch_list.topic: Naira / FX / inflation / cement & construction input costs
watch_list.why: Directly hits build costs (BAFF, drainage, roadworks) and real pricing power.

watch_list.topic: Affordable housing policy (FG 100,000 homes, state housing programmes)
watch_list.why: Public supply in the affordable band competes directly with Lakowe Annexe positioning.

watch_list.topic: Insecurity / kidnapping affecting site access and buyer sentiment
watch_list.why: Escort withdrawal and insecurity have already been cited as stalling real estate delivery.

data_hooks._note: Optional but powerful. If you later expose live numbers (from the commercial dashboard), drop the latest values here so the engine can quote them. Update manually for now if useful.
